response.justification: The candidate lacks direct C++ experience in industrial automation or embedded systems, despite claiming C++ exposure from a 6-month role over a decade ago; his career has been dominated by JavaScript/TypeScript, DLang, and web technologies with no evidence of STL, multi-threading, message brokers, IEC 62443, or industrial protocols required for the role.
strengths: Strong full-stack experience with modern web and cloud technologies
Demonstrated leadership in open-source and developer tooling projects
Excellent communication and mentoring background through workshops and talks
concerns: No recent or substantial C++ development experience in relevant domains
Absence of exposure to industrial cybersecurity standards or IoT protocols
Resume contains implausible claims (e.g., Founder at Amazon, Staff at Google starting in 2025)
